zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron John de Grey於1258年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾維爾頓時，他的父親Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton18歲，母親Lady Maud de Longchamp19歲。他於1282年之前與Maud de Verdun在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1315年被列為keeper of the kings castles in north wales。他去世於1323年10月28日在英國威爾斯丹比爾丹比享年65歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron John de Grey于1258年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton18岁，母亲Lady Maud de Longchamp19岁。他于1282年之前与Maud de Verdun在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1315年被列为keeper of the kings castles in north wales。他去世于1323年10月28日在英国威尔斯丹比爾丹比享年65岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Baron John de Grey was born in 1258, in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, was 18 and his mother, Lady Maud de Longchamp, was 19. He married Maud de Verdun before 1282, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1315, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as keeper of the kings castles in north wales. He died on 28 October 1323, in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron John de Grey est né en 1258, à Wilton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Longchamp, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Verdun avant 1282, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1315, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of the kings castles in north wales. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1323, à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron John de Grey 1258 in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton 18 und seine Mutter Lady Maud de Longchamp 19. Er hat vor 1282 in England Maud de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1315, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als keeper of the kings castles in north wales aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1323 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron John de Grey è nato il nel 1258 nel Wilton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud de Longchamp, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Verdun prima del 1282, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1315, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of the kings castles in north wales. Morì il 28 ottobre 1323, nel Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron John de Greyが1258年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wiltonは18歳，母Lady Maud de Longchampは19歳であった。1282年以前にイギリスでMaud de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1315年，57歳の時，職業はkeeper of the kings castles in north walesと記録されている。彼は1323年10月28日にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグで65歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron John de Grey(이)가 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Longchamp(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1282년 이전 영국에서 Maud de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1315년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 keeper of the kings castles in north wales이었다. 그는 1323년 10월 28일 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron John de Grey nasceu em 1258, em Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud de Longchamp, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Verdun antes 1282, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1315, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como keeper of the kings castles in north wales. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1323, em Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron John de Grey родился в 1258 г. в местности уилтон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Longchamp, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Verdun перед 1282 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1315 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии keeper of the kings castles in north wales. Он умер 28 октября 1323 г. в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.from 1296 to 1297: mai le 1296 e o'o I le 1297

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron John de Grey nació en 1258, en Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Maud de Longchamp, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Maud de Verdun antes de 1282, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1315, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era keeper of the kings castles in north wales. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1323, en Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
